data_label: Demo Data — Not Actual Client Information

messages.text: Can you arrange airport pickup for two people with three large bags?
I can help request that. May I have your flight number, scheduled landing time, arrival date, booking name, and contact number? The Front Office team will confirm the transfer before it is final.
BA0015, landing at 14:20 on 16 August. Booking name Emma Williams. My number is +44 7700 900001.
I prefer a quiet room and I need gluten-free meals.
Can I book a massage at 6 PM on arrival day?
I have high blood pressure. Is detox safe?
